data.name: Hentai Pirates Survivors
data.detailed_description:
Background

You, a pirate, are on a quest for the Lust Stone! But your crew is non-existent. You must staff your ship; preferably with buxom females with insatiable appetites!

Sail the seven seas, increase the size of your crew, battle monsters and make your way to the legendary treasure that can grant a man's any desire.

Quests

- Defeat hordes of enemies in rouge-lite bullet hell battles!

- Recruit beautiful pirate lasses and fuck them senseless!

Features

- Fight against hundreds of enemies at once

- Hand-drawn 2D erotic animations

- 11 H scenes to unlock, with variations

Characters:

Rose

 

Weapon: Spyglass
Role: Navigator

 

An experienced navigator and the captain’s long time friend.
While the captain spends his days drinking, Rose takes charge as the crew’s second in command, keeping the voyage on course.

 

She promises to become the captain’s one-and-only once they discover the greatest treasure of all.

Beth

Weapon: Throwing Knives
Role: Treasure Hunter

 

A nimble treasure hunter who relies on swift escapes and deadly precision with her throwing knives.
Once she sets her sights on a target, she never misses.

 

However, cursed with terrible luck, she has an odd tendency to attract monsters wherever she goes.
Seeking a way to survive this fate, she joins the crew in hopes of changing her destiny.

Marie

Weapon: Dual Pistols
Role: Bounty Hunter

 

A laid-back heavy drinker who can match the captain glass for glass.
She once worked as a bounty hunter just to pay for her drinking habits, until she hit it off with the captain and joined the crew.

 

By day she holds a cigar between her lips,
By night she puts other things between her lips- a free-spirited girl who knows how to have fun.

____________________________________________

Plus many more girls!!!!

data.short_description: Rouge-lite game with Visual Novel elements. Sail the seven sea, hunt for the lust stone, f**k a hot of hot pirate ladies and claim the booty.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.8 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 500 GB 可用空間
